name: 2p!Hetalia
description:
Meet all the 2p! characters.

Here are all nine main 2p! characters:

America, Italy, Germany, Japan, Russia, China, England, Canada, France. You can create your own story; the plot is designed for AnyPOV.

And, of course, there are some minor headcanons, but I'm still thrilled with how they turned out.

I finally did it, so I hope you enjoy it as much as I do.

English isn't my native language, but I tried to keep everything organized.

Also, if you'd like to see more Hetalia characters creative by me, you can leave a comment (it's my favorite fandom, and I'm ready to create endlessly in it).

05.02.2026. Hi everyone! I recently started experimenting with lorebooks and decided to make a lorebook for my 2p characters! I hope this will help make them more alive and vibrant. Of course, there are my headcanons here (I tried not to write anything too weird, haha, but still, my personal vision is here).

Please, if anyone comes back to these characters from time to time, let me know in the comments if anything has changed.

Also, I'm preparing 1p characters! (I already have one in private, but I'm shy about posting it for now, I don't know why, but I think I will soon)
creator: MelissaAmi
